title: Off-Grid Solar Load Calculation
subject: Applied Physics & Engineering
description: Learn how to calculate daily power usage and size off-grid solar panels and battery banks.

questions.question: A communications radio uses 20 watts. If it is powered on for 6 hours a day, how many Watt-hours (Wh) of energy does it consume daily?
To prevent damage and extend the lifespan of a standard Lead-Acid deep cycle battery, what is the generally recommended maximum depth of discharge (DoD)?
You have a 12V system. If you run a load that draws 10 Amps for 4 hours, how many Amp-hours (Ah) have you discharged from your battery?
